title: ExternalAnchorMutationPreparedState
description: Authoritative prepared-mutation record state for broker-local external anchor submission control-plane.

run_id.description: Run identifier bound to this prepared mutation.

execution_pathway.description: Authoritative execution pathway marker for this external anchor flow; never a workspace execution route.

anchor_posture.description: Operator-facing external anchor posture derived from lifecycle/execution state.

destination_ref.description: Canonical target-descriptor digest-derived destination reference used for allowlist matching.

typed_request_schema_id.description: Schema identifier of the authoritative typed request object.

typed_request_schema_version.description: Schema version of the authoritative typed request object.

typed_request_hash.description: Canonical hash of the authoritative typed request object.

action_request_hash.description: Canonical action request hash bound during prepare policy evaluation.

policy_decision_hash.description: Canonical policy decision hash bound during prepare policy evaluation.

required_approval_id.description: Required approval identifier resolved at prepare time.

required_approval_request_hash.description: Bound approval request digest required at execute time.

required_approval_decision_hash.description: Bound approval decision digest required at execute time.

execution_state.description: Execution posture state for the prepared mutation.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp for the durable prepared record.

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp for the durable prepared record.

last_prepare_request_id.description: Last prepare request identifier recorded for diagnostics.

last_get_request_id.description: Last get request identifier recorded for diagnostics.

last_execute_request_id.description: Last execute request identifier recorded for diagnostics.

last_execute_target_auth_lease_id.description: Last execute target auth lease identifier recorded for diagnostics and binding traceability.

last_execute_attempt_id.description: Durable execute attempt id bound to immutable request inputs.

last_execute_attempt_seal_digest.description: Execute attempt immutable binding to seal digest identity.

last_execute_attempt_target_descriptor_d.description: Execute attempt immutable binding to canonical target descriptor digest identity.

last_execute_attempt_typed_request_hash.description: Execute attempt immutable binding to authoritative typed request hash.

last_execute_snapshot_segment_id.description: Immutable segment identifier snapshot captured before outbound execution.

last_execute_snapshot_seal_digest.description: Immutable seal digest snapshot captured before outbound execution.

last_execute_deferred_polls_remaining.description: Durable deferred poll budget remaining for background completion.

last_anchor_receipt_digest.description: Digest identity of the last persisted external anchor receipt envelope.

last_anchor_evidence_digest.description: Digest identity of the last persisted typed external anchor evidence payload.

last_anchor_verification_digest.description: Digest identity of the last persisted audit verification report for external anchor receipt binding.

last_anchor_proof_digest.description: Digest identity of the last persisted external anchor proof sidecar.

last_anchor_provider_receipt_digest.description: Digest identity of the last persisted provider receipt sidecar.

last_anchor_transcript_digest.description: Digest identity of the last persisted verification transcript sidecar.
